name: NTRIP stream stall + recovery watchdog
info:
Emits a message when the NTRIP correction stream stops flowing
AND when it starts flowing again — nothing else.

How it works:
- Every message from the NTRIP Client resets the trigger node's timer.
- If no message arrives within 60 seconds, the trigger fires; a change
  node tags it with topic=stall and the state tracker function emits a
  STALLED notification (once).
- When data resumes, the state tracker sees the first data frame after
  the stall and emits a RECOVERED notification (once).
- While the stream is flowing normally, the state tracker suppresses
  per-frame messages — you only see transitions.

Adjust the timeout in the trigger node's Duration field.

name: state tracker
